content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: Normal volatility environment with broad participation. Vol: 27.1%. Breadth: 7/8 sectors positive.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Holding & Investment and Energy & Chemicals are leading; Holding: SAHOL (1W: +5.44% | 1M: -13.73%) RECOVERY, KCHOL (1W: +3.53% | 1M: -12.31%) RECOVERY. Energy: TUPRS (1W: +2.13% | 1M: +18.00%) ABOVE TREND, PETKM (1W: +9.46% | 1M: +4.84%) ABOVE TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Banking & Finance is the clear laggard: GARAN (1W: -1.99% | 1M: -18.68%) BELOW TREND, AKBNK (1W: -2.03% | 1M: -20.41%) BELOW TREND. Retail also shows dispersion with headline losers like SOKM (1W: -8.28% | 1M: -18.15%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
TKFEN (1W: +15.25% | 1M: -0.58%) RECOVERY; BIMAS (1W: +13.85% | 1M: +0.78%) ABOVE TREND; SASA (1W: +10.81% | 1M: -9.23%) RECOVERY; PETKM (1W: +9.46% | 1M: +4.84%) ABOVE TREND; TOASO (1W: +7.07% | 1M: -6.05%) RECOVERY.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
GARAN (1W: -1.99% | 1M: -18.68%) BELOW TREND; AKBNK (1W: -2.03% | 1M: -20.41%) BELOW TREND; OYAKC (1W: -2.04% | 1M: -15.43%) BELOW TREND; ASELS (1W: -3.37% | 1M: +6.88%) CORRECTION; ALARK (1W: -3.49% | 1M: -21.23%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Highest 1W movers: TKFEN (1W: +15.25% | 1M: -0.58%) RECOVERY; BIMAS (1W: +13.85% | 1M: +0.78%) ABOVE TREND; SASA (1W: +10.81% | 1M: -9.23%) RECOVERY; PETKM (1W: +9.46% | 1M: +4.84%) ABOVE TREND; DOHOL (1W: +6.94% | 1M: -3.63%) RECOVERY.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banks remain weak and under pressure on 1M weakness; GARAN (1W: -1.99% | 1M: -18.68%) BELOW TREND, AKBNK (1W: -2.03% | 1M: -20.41%) BELOW TREND, ISCTR (1W: -1.05% | 1M: -22.48%) BELOW TREND, HALKB (1W: -4.33% | 1M: -13.50%) BELOW TREND — avoid fresh exposure until 1M trends stabilize.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Mixed recovery in autos and steel: TOASO (1W: +7.07% | 1M: -6.05%) RECOVERY, FROTO (1W: +1.11% | 1M: -13.76%) RECOVERY, EREGL (1W: +0.71% | 1M: -5.02%) RECOVERY; ASELS (1W: -3.37% | 1M: +6.88%) CORRECTION signals short-term pullback in defense.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Selective strength; TUPRS (1W: +2.13% | 1M: +18.00%) ABOVE TREND and PETKM (1W: +9.46% | 1M: +4.84%) ABOVE TREND are outperforming, while OYAKC (1W: -2.04% | 1M: -15.43%) BELOW TREND highlights intra-sector divergence.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Risk-ON: overweight cyclical exposure (select energy, holding & investment and high-momentum industrials) and maintain underweight banks and structurally weak retail names until 1M trends confirm. Keep position sizes disciplined and use TGTs/stops given ongoing divergences.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
TUPRS (1W: +2.13% | 1M: +18.00%) ABOVE TREND for momentum on refining margins; TKFEN (1W: +15.25% | 1M: -0.58%) RECOVERY for takeover/contract flow headlines; BIMAS (1W: +13.85% | 1M: +0.78%) ABOVE TREND ahead of consumer datapoints; ASELS (1W: -3.37% | 1M: +6.88%) CORRECTION for earnings/catalyst risk.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Holding & Investment for flow into large-cap conglomerates, Energy & Chemicals for margin-driven moves, and Construction & REIT for catch-up rallies and corporate news.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100’s 20-day average for near-term support and the recent multi-week highs for upside; catalysts: CBRT statements, import/export and industrial production prints, Q1 corporate updates, and USD/TRY moves that will re-rate banks vs cyclicals.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
RISK-ON with normal volatility and 7/8 sectors positive; leadership is concentrated in holding groups, energy and selected industrials. Main opportunities: selective energy (TUPRS, PETKM) and high-momentum cyclical names (TKFEN, BIMAS); main risks: persistent weakness in banks and retail that could derail breadth.
